name: Align mobile API type-only dependency documentation
description: Resolve the contradiction where docs/project_context.md bans apps/mobile tsconfig references to ../api while agent and architecture docs document that reference as an accepted type-only exception.
acceptanceCriteria: docs/project_context.md, AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, and docs/architecture.md consistently describe the apps/mobile -> apps/api type-only AppType exception and still forbid runtime imports from @eduagent/api.
